title: Charred Croatian Cheonggukjang Grill
description: A hearty and savory dish featuring the bold flavors of cheonggukjang and ferment-jang, served with a charred twist.

ingredients.name: cheonggukjang
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality, fermented cheonggukjang paste

ingredients.name: ferment-jang
ingredients.notes: a thick, savory sauce made from fermented soybeans

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality, extra-virgin olive oil

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: use a freshly ground black pepper

instructions: in a small bowl, mix together cheonggukjang, ferment-jang, and 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
season pork shoulder with salt and black pepper.
add pork shoulder to the grill and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until slightly charred and cooked through.
add chopped carrots and minced garlic to the grill and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until tender.
brush the charred carrots and garlic with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
serve the charred Croatian cheonggukjang grill with the pork shoulder, carrots, and garlic.
